2605.28742.title: CORE: Contrastive Reflection Enables Rapid Improvements in Reasoning
2605.28742.paper_summary: Language models can use verifiable rewards to improve at a wide variety of reasoning tasks. However, both parametric (e.g. RLVR) and non-parametric (e.g. prompt optimization) approaches to doing so typically require hundreds of training samples and thousands of model rollouts, making them expensive in the best case and intractable in the worst. To address this challenge, we introduce Contrastive Reflection (CORE), a non-parametric learning algorithm that compares past reasoning traces to generate insights: short natural-language descriptions of reasoning strategies and constraints that capture differences between successful and unsuccessful problem attempts. Across four reasoning tasks, we demonstrate that CORE enables more rapid improvement than both parametric (GRPO) and non-parametric (GEPA, episodic RAG, and MemRL) methods, while using fewer rollouts. Under fixed rollout budgets with as few as five training samples, we then show that CORE also achieves comparable or greater performance gains than each baseline. Finally, we highlight how CORE is also substantially more context-efficient than non-parametric baselines, requiring fewer prompt tokens while storing learned knowledge as compact, interpretable natural-language insights. Our results therefore suggest that distilling contrasts between successful and unsuccessful reasoning traces into abstract and useful insights can provide a more efficient and interpretable route to model self-improvement than weight updates, prompt optimization, or direct reuse of stored reasoning traces.
2605.28742.paper_summary_zh: 語言模型可以使用可驗證的獎勵來改善各種推理任務。<lb/>然而，無論是參數化（例如 RLVR）還是非參數化（例如提示優化）的方法，通常都需要數百個訓練樣本和數千次模型回合，這使得它們在最佳情況下成本高昂，而在最糟糕的情況下則難以處理。<lb/>為了解決這一挑戰，我們引入了對比反思（CORE），這是一種非參數學習算法，通過比較過去的推理痕跡來生成見解：短小的自然語言描述，闡述推理策略和約束，捕捉成功和不成功的問題嘗試之間的差異。<lb/>在四個推理任務中，我們展示了 CORE 使得改進速度比參數化（GRPO）和非參數化（GEPA、情節 RAG 和 MemRL）方法更快，同時使用更少的回合。<lb/>在固定的回合預算下，即使只有五個訓練樣本，我們也展示了 CORE 能夠實現與每個基線相當或更大的性能增益。<lb/>最後，我們強調 CORE 在上下文效率上也顯著優於非參數基線，需求更少的提示標記，同時將學到的知識以緊湊、可解釋的自然語言見解進行存儲。<lb/>因此，我們的結果表明，將成功和不成功的推理痕跡之間的對比提煉成抽象且有用的見解，可以提供比權重更新、提示優化或直接重用存儲的推理痕跡更有效且可解釋的模型自我改進途徑。
2605.28742.author: Linas Nasvytis et.al.
2605.28742.authors: Linas Nasvytis, Simon Jerome Han, Ben Prystawski, Satchel Grant, Noah D. Goodman, Judith E. Fan
